source_pr.title: resourcemanager: support worker pool
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #42511

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?
This PR supports a worker pool that can change workers dynamically by the resource manager.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: No concrete flaky failure signature is captured in this case; the PR primarily adds a new resourcemanager worker pool and enables Bazel `race = "on"` for the new test target.
failure_signature: Bazel metadata-only signal (`race = "on"`) with no concrete race report/log captured here
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR is mainly a feature addition (worker pool support in resourcemanager) and associated tests. The case evidence here only points to enabling Bazel `race = "on"`, which is not a root-cause explanation by itself unless accompanied by the actual race report and a focused fix. Keep this as insufficient evidence until we have the concrete flaky signature (race output/CI log) and a root-cause analysis.
fix_pattern: Feature PR + enabling race detector without a concrete race report in the case evidence; keep as insufficient evidence until failing logs and a focused fix identify the underlying race.
analysis:
PR title: resourcemanager: support worker pool
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/42513
Triage sources: manual_triage, explicit_flaky_signal
Triage summary: + race = "on",
Changed files (5): metrics/metrics.go, resourcemanager/pool/workerpool/BUILD.bazel, resourcemanager/pool/workerpool/main_test.go, resourcemanager/pool/workerpool/workerpool.go, resourcemanager/pool/workerpool/workpool_test.go
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
